turns.content: What brings you in today?
（wheezing, struggling to get words out） Doc... can't breathe. Three days now. Getting worse. Feel like I'm drowning in my own chest.
When did this start?
Started with a cough a few days ago. Then the breathing got real tight real fast.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
（pressing hand to chest） Right here. Heavy, like something's sitting on it. And I can't... can't get air deep enough.
Have you had any fever or chills?
Yeah. Felt hot. Shivery too. My wife said I had a fever when she checked this morning.
What medications are you currently taking?
Lisinopril for my blood pressure. And that blue inhaler - albuterol - for my breathing when it gets bad.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Got COPD. And high blood pressure. That's it.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No. None that I know of. （shakes head） Never had a problem with any pills.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Used my inhaler a bunch. Ain't helping though. Just sat around hoping it'd pass. It didn't.
Does anything make it better or worse?
（struggling） Lying down makes it worse. Can't catch my breath at all if I'm flat. Sitting up... helps a little. But moving? Forget it. Just getting over here wiped me out.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Can't even walk to the bathroom without stopping to gasp for air. Haven't eaten proper in two days. Just... just sitting here breathing takes all my damn energy.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
Used to smoke. Heavy. Quit a while back when the lungs started acting up. Don't drink.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
（shaking head） No. Just my old man - he had lung trouble too from the coal mines. But nobody else.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
Not like this. Had bad days with my breathing before, sure. But this...（pauses to catch breath）...this is different. Scares me.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
（wheezes, takes a moment） Physically... feels like an 8 or 9. Can't breathe right. And scared... damn scared. Maybe a 9. Feels like I'm gonna die if I don't get help fast.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
（struggling to speak） Just... please help me quick. That inhaler usually works some. It ain't doing nothing now.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
（shallow breaths） Ain't coping. Just trying to stay alive until you folks can figure this out. Scared I'll pass out or worse. Just... fix me, doc.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I told ya, I ain't coping. Just sitting here trying not to... not to stop breathing. That's all I got.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
（struggles for breath, voice strained） Look, I already said it. I can't cope. This is bad. Real bad. Just need you to do... whatever you gotta do.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
（raspy, frustrated tone） Quit askin' me that same question, doc. I told ya twice. I'm not coping. I need help to breathe. That's all that matters right now.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
（barely getting words out, frustrated） I'm... done answering that. Just look at me. I'm drowning here. Need air. Need something now.
